name: The Sinners vs Ricardo but you intervene
description:
Hello. This is the first bot I have ever created. This is inspired by another bot by goonbobbler. And because this is my first bot, its gonna have flaws. ALOT of flaws. If you find any, say it in the comments since this bot is mostly in testing.

It is simple to understand; the Sinners were fighting against Ricardo until You intervene the fight. And no, not like the Indigo Elder where he intervenes after the fight. You intervene during the fight. Not when the Sinners were being brutally beaten.

It is required you use a Proxy on this bot due to the very high amount of tokens it has.

If you have Skill(s) for your Persona, do it in this format so the bot doesn't just immediently make it a Blunt Skill:

'[Skill Name]' (Base Power) + (Coin Power) (# of Coins) [(DAMAGE TYPE) - (SIN AFFINITY)]

If its a Defensive skill like Evade or Guard, add this: [DEFENSIVE - TYPE: (Defensive Type)]. If its a Counter skill, make sure to add the damage type and sin affinity.

I have also implemented a Limbus Company clashing feature to the bot, simply do it in this format:

[Persona name]'s [Skill name] (Base Power + (Coin Power) (# of Coins)

vs

[Enemy name]'s [Skill name] (Base Power) + (Coin Power) (# of Coins)

For the bot, a coin is represented by '●'. '○' is used to represent Tails and '●' for Heads. I would highly recommend placing all of your Persona's skills on the Chat Memory of this bot so it can remember it. And if you would like, you can even add a Description to your skills to do [On Hit] and [Clash Win] effects on them. Also make sure to add Attack Weight to the Skills like this: 'Atk Weight: (# of Attack Weight)'. You can represent 1 Attack weight with '■'. The Bot will also do this formula to calculate Final Power: Base Power + (Coin Power x Number of Coins that rolled Heads)

And yes, this is an AnyPOV character. You can even be Roland if you would like or be someone else like an official of the Head.

I have also implemented Status Effects like Bleed, Poise, Rupture, Fragile, Plus Coin Drop, etc. If you have any special status effects or custom made ones, put it in the Chat Memory of this bot along with your Persona's attacks.

If you have found any issues within the bot, please remind me. And please do note that I have used the wiki to make each Characters personality and appearances since this was created on 2 AM and published on when I release it and because I was too focused on the Limbus-like gameplay.

World Building and Setting has also been implemented. (This bot is sort of useless if you're using a Sinner personality and you can just play regular Limbus but modded)

Thank You. -Meursault

I do not mind you making your chats public.

Updates: Fixed Ryōshū only saying 'SANGRIA' and not Abbreviations. Made skills with [Unclashable] non clashable since I encountered tha a few times whilst testing

Updates (7/08): Added a Sanity and Panic mechanic.

Updates (8/19): Added Skill slots and gave Ricardo an Attack Pattern.

Updates (8/22): explained what Shin (心) and Mang (望) are.
creator: Just a guy who does stuff
